title: Implement command substitution $(cmd)
description: Add support for  and  syntax in command parsing. Before executing a command, recursively evaluate command substitutions and replace with their output. Support nested substitutions up to depth 3. Undefined/failed commands should expand to empty string with error logged. Vision gap: 'Command substitution not implemented — prevents nested command execution'. Acceptance: echo $(pwd) returns cwd, cat $(echo hello) returns hello, nesting up to depth 3 works.
